summary: Tested iteration 135 features: Retroactive badge awards, has_trade fix for Daily Projection, and Trade History Day # column. All backend tests pass (12/12). UI verified badges section shows 6 earned badges, streak indicator always visible (0 streak), and has_trade checkmarks appear correctly in Daily Projection table.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user data with 20 trades
context_for_next_testing_agent: User has 20 trades in Jan/Feb 2026, 6 badges earned (First Trade, Getting Started, Streak Starter, Streak Master 7, Streak Master 14, 10 Days Active). Retroactive badge scan works correctly. Trade Monitor shows 0 streak when no current streak. Daily Projection table shows green checkmarks for days with trades.

retroactive_badge_scan.details: POST /api/rewards/retroactive-scan returns stats and newly_awarded array. Stats include: lifetime_trades, distinct_trade_days, best_streak_days, current_streak_days, lifetime_deposit_usdt, qualified_referrals

retroactive_scan_all.details: POST /api/rewards/retroactive-scan-all works for master admin, returns scanned count and results array

daily_balances_has_trade.details: GET /api/profit/daily-balances returns has_trade field. UI shows green checkmarks for days with trades

trade_history_day_number.details: GET /api/trade/history returns trade_day_number for each trade and total_trade_days in response. UI table shows Day column with numbered badges

streak_indicator_always_visible.details: Trade History card shows streak indicator (0 streak) even when streak is 0, not gated by streak > 0

badges_section_my_rewards.details: Badges & Achievements section shows 6/30 earned: First Trade, Getting Started, Streak Master 7, Streak Starter, Streak Master 14, 10 Days Active (activity category with calendar icon)

ui_screenshots_taken: my_rewards_page - Shows badges section with 6 earned badges
daily_projection_february - Shows green checkmarks for days with trades
